pr.title: Library, menu, and game system decompilation matches
pr.author: johnwinston

summary: PR #2367 added decompiled bodies and related header/type/include updates across library, menu, game-system, and trophy-viewer files. The PR body says 8 functions were matched, while the bot report supports 5 new 100% matches and 3 partial unmatched-item improvements.

key_files.role: Added gm_80164504 body for hidden-stage unlock mask and notification logic; bot reported 99.52% improvement, not a full new match.
evidence_refs: diff: gm_80164504 replaces /// # stub with C body

key_files.role: Added lbArq_80014D2C body initializing ARQ global lists and node pool.
evidence_refs: diff: lbArq_80014D2C clears list entries, links nodes, uses PAD_STACK(8)

key_files.role: Added fn_800244F4 body resetting many audio state globals and calling gm_801603B0; added gm_1601 include.
evidence_refs: diff: fn_800244F4 assigns default int/float values to lbl_804D* globals

key_files.role: Updated fn_800244F4 prototype from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void(void).
Added extern/static declarations for audio globals used by fn_800244F4.
evidence_refs: diff: adds lbl_804D63F8 extern and several lbl_804D3890/3894/389C/38A4 static globals

key_files.role: Added fn_8001EB14 body opening THP path, reading header, reporting unsupported/newer format warnings, and initializing decode fields.
evidence_refs: diff: fn_8001EB14 calls THPInit, DVDConvertPathToEntrynum, lbFile_800161C4, OSReport

key_files.role: Expanded THPDecComp fields and updated fn_8001EB14 signature; added THPInit declaration.
evidence_refs: diff: THPDecComp gains fields at offsets 0x08, 0x0C, 0x10, 0x14, 0x1C, 0x24, 0x70, 0x110, 0x11C, 0x128, 0x130, 0x134
diff: fn_8001EB14 prototype becomes s32 fn_8001EB14(THPDecComp* data, const char* path)

key_files.role: Added fn_8024FC48 body handling Data Delete menu exit animation or selected option highlight; bot reported partial improvement.
evidence_refs: diff: fn_8024FC48 branches on mn_804A04F0.cur_menu and loops over 6 menu entries

key_files.role: Added mn_802307F8 body replacing rules-menu text and selecting a string index by mode/index; bot reported partial improvement.
evidence_refs: diff: mn_802307F8 destroys old HSD_Text, looks up mn_803EC818/mn_804D4B96, creates and styles new text

key_files.role: Added struct mn_802307F8_t layout and updated mn_802307F8 prototype.
evidence_refs: diff: struct mn_802307F8_t includes x0/x1/x2 padding and HSD_Text* at 0x130

key_files.role: Added mnNameNew_8023B224 body handling exit from name entry to different parent menu flows; uses PAD_STACK(8).
evidence_refs: diff: mnNameNew_8023B224 branches on gm_801A4310 values 0x1B and 0x01 and otherwise returns to character select

key_files.role: Updated mnNameNew_8023B224 prototype from unknown signature to void(u8).
Extended trophy camera data struct and added un_80307828 body resetting trophy viewer camera/light state and interest point; uses PAD_STACK(12).
evidence_refs: diff: TyCameraData_ gains x24/x28/x2C/x58 fields and un_803B8858 extern

key_files.role: Updated un_80307828 prototype from UNK_RET to void(int).

what_changed: Replaced 8 decomp stubs with C bodies according to the PR body: lbArq_80014D2C, mnNameNew_8023B224, fn_800244F4, fn_8001EB14, un_80307828, gm_80164504, fn_8024FC48, and mn_802307F8.
Updated public headers for recovered function signatures in lbaudio_ax.h, lbmthp.h, mnmainrule.h, mnnamenew.h, and toy.h.
Expanded local structs and static declarations needed by recovered bodies, including THPDecComp, mn_802307F8_t, TyCameraData_, and lbaudio_ax static/global declarations.
Added includes for newly referenced functions and types, including gm_1601.h, lbfile.h, dolphin/dvd.h, mnmainrule.h, gm menu headers, lbcardgame.h, mncharsel.h, and mnname.h.

The bot report recorded 61.13% matched code overall, +0.03% and +1120 bytes, with 5 new 100% matches and 8 unmatched-item improvements including 3 partially matched functions and data-section improvements.

smart_moves.lesson: Recovered function signatures were propagated into headers alongside the new bodies instead of leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations.
evidence_refs: diff: lbmthp.h fn_8001EB14 s32(THPDecComp*, const char*)
diff: mnmainrule.h mn_802307F8 void(struct mn_802307F8_t*, s32, s32)

smart_moves.lesson: Partial struct recovery was used to express known offsets as fields where the new bodies needed them.
evidence_refs: diff: toy.c TyCameraData_ fields x24/x28/x2C/x58 added

smart_moves.lesson: The PR used normal C loops for list/node initialization and menu-entry iteration where repeated work varied by index.
evidence_refs: diff: lbarq.c for (i = 0; i < 9; i++) links nodes
diff: mndatadel.c for (i = 0; i < 6; i++) updates Data Delete menu entries

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a decompiled body proves a function signature, update the owning header in the same scoped change so callsites can use the recovered signature.
evidence_refs: diff: five headers changed from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS or UNK_RET to typed prototypes

decomp_lessons.lesson: For offset-heavy recovery, adding only the fields required by the matched function can improve readability while leaving unknown regions padded.
evidence_refs: diff: THPDecComp expands selected header and state offsets
diff: TyCameraData_ adds camera reset fields
diff: mn_802307F8_t models x2 and text at 0x130

decomp_lessons.lesson: Bot score reports may distinguish between full matches and high-percentage improvements; intake should preserve that distinction instead of treating all PR-body 'matches' as 100%.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists 5 new matches and 3 partial function improvements

naming_conventions.convention: Many newly recovered symbols kept address-style or existing generated names such as fn_800244F4, fn_8001EB14, fn_8024FC48, lbl_804D*, and unk_* fields where semantics were not fully proven.
evidence_refs: diff: lbaudio_ax.c uses fn_800244F4 and lbl_804D* globals
diff: lbmthp.h uses THPDecComp unk_* fields

naming_conventions.convention: Short local role names were used for obvious object roles, such as data, text, gobj, jobj, cobj, node, and global.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK was retained narrowly in three recovered functions.
Goto labels were used in gm_80164504 to model found-stage/found-notify search exits; bot score shows this remained a 99.52% improvement rather than a full match.
Direct raw user_data pointer access and casts were used in menu functions where full structs were not recovered.
evidence_refs: diff: mndatadel.c uses u8* user_data and offsets user_data + 0xC, user_data[0]
diff: mnnamenew.c uses u8* user_data and user_data[0x59]

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Exact float literals and string literals were kept inline for text positioning, camera defaults, and OSReport messages.
evidence_refs: diff: mnmainrule.c HSD_SisLib_803A5ACC float arguments and font_size 0.0521F
diff: toy.c data->x20 = 38.0F and zero resets
diff: lbmthp.c OSReport warning string literals

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.summary: Reported matched code 61.13% (+0.03%, +1120 bytes), 5 new 100% function matches, and 8 improvements in unmatched items including 3 partial function improvements and data-section improvements.

searchable_terms: Library menu game system decompilation matches
follow_up_queries: PR 2367 decomp-dev bot 5 new matches 8 improvements
PR 2367 lbaudio_ax fn_800244F4 audio reset globals

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR #2367 state CLOSED merged_at null
human_pr_text: PR body summary and function descriptions
raw_diff: complete diff excerpt for all changed files
notes: No human review comments were present in the loaded slice.
The PR body claims 8 matched functions, but the bot report supports 5 new 100% matches and 3 partial function improvements; this postmortem preserves the distinction.
The PR was closed with merged_at null in metadata; intake does not infer merge status beyond that.
No local build, objdiff logs, or reviewer rationale were loaded beyond the bot score report.
The PR body includes generated-with-Claude text; do not infer author intent beyond the submitted code, body, and bot report.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Propagate recovered signatures to owning headers
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2367 recovered several function bodies and updated their owning headers from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to typed signatures in the same slice.
evidence_refs: diff: lbaudio_ax.h, lbmthp.h, mnmainrule.h, mnnamenew.h, toy.h prototype updates

accepted_candidate_records.title: Preserve match-status granularity from bot reports
accepted_candidate_records.text: When a PR body describes functions as matched but the bot report separates 100% new matches from partial improvements, record the bot-reported match granularity rather than flattening all functions to accepted full matches.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists 5 new matches and partial improvements for gm_80164504, fn_8024FC48, mn_802307F8

source_update_candidates.title: Require PR postmortems to distinguish claimed matches from bot-reported partial improvements
source_update_candidates.text: If PR prose claims a set of matches but bot/checkdiff output reports only a subset as 100% and others as partial improvements, preserve the narrower bot result in intake and curation records.
evidence_refs: PR #2367 bot report says 5 new matches and 8 improvements including gm_80164504 99.52%, fn_8024FC48 98.26%, mn_802307F8 85.89%
source_update_candidates.reason: This PR provides a concrete example where PR-body wording and bot match categories differ.

source_update_candidates.title: PAD_STACK use should be paired with explicit verification evidence in matching PRs
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2367 used PAD_STACK in three recovered functions. Existing standards already say matching tactics need evidence; this PR can serve as an example candidate for ensuring PAD_STACK entries are recorded with the narrow bot/build evidence that justified them.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists these three as 100% matches
source_update_candidates.reason: The loaded standards already mention PAD_STACK; curator may decide whether this PR is useful as an illustrative historical example rather than a new rule.

source_update_candidates.title: PR #2367 touched library, menu, game-mode, and trophy-viewer recovery paths
source_update_candidates.text: The changed files span src/melee/lb, src/melee/mn, src/melee/gm, and src/melee/ty, with recovered functions in ARQ, audio, THP movie playback, menu flows, stage unlock logic, and trophy camera reset.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: 14 changed files across lb, mn, gm, ty
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful for source-path search/corpus indexing if curator maintains PR-to-path facts.

rejection_notes: Do not record PR #2367 as merged; metadata shows state CLOSED and merged_at null.
Do not record all 8 functions as accepted 100% matches; bot evidence supports 5 new 100% matches and 3 partial function improvements.
Do not infer reviewer approval or reviewer intent; no human review comments were loaded.
Do not promote field names like unk_08, x2, x58, or lbl_804D* as semantic names; they are address/offset-style placeholders in the diff.
Do not generalize the goto shape in gm_80164504 as preferred style; it is only evidenced as the submitted partial-match shape.
